meta.name: drift-demo
meta.description: Minimal project memory for the architectural-drift flagship walkthrough. Encodes ADR-001 and ADR-003 as enforceable rules. Constraints are deliberately specific (dependency-level) so the enforcer fires on real violations rather than on benign vocabulary.

decisions.decision: JSON storage only -- no external database.
decisions.rationale: The service runs on edge hardware where shipping a separate database is operationally unacceptable. Persistence stays in-process until a usage threshold defined in ADR-005 is crossed.

decisions.decision: No ORM in v1. Direct module access against the JSON store.
decisions.rationale: An ORM is operational complexity the v1 service does not justify. Direct module access keeps the storage abstraction one function-call wide.
